end_ip.description: The last IP address in the range that is allowed to access the Redis cache.

name.description: The name of the firewall rule.

redis_cache_name.description: The name of the Redis cache instance to which the firewall rule applies.

start_ip.description: The first IP address in the range that is allowed to access the Redis cache.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
